offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, compliance reporting delays cause project delays. We generate standardized compliance reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports for multiple projects.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in community forums for contractors
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
